text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Aaaaah! Top Road, show us a victory for the ages!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: You're the gutsiest and most amazing runner I know, Doto! You can definitely, definitely win this!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
It's all you, Opera O! This racetrack is all yours to
reign over!

text_block_list.name: Spectator D
text_block_list.text:
Cafe! Take down the older runners! Run for
Tachyon's sake too! You're the future!

text_block_list.name: Spectator E
text_block_list.text:
With a lineup like this, I wonder how Air Shakur is
gonna fare.

text_block_list.name: Spectator F
text_block_list.text:
She may be the best in her year, but that's not
saying much since she's the only one who shows
any promise. Not counting Digitan, that is.

text_block_list.name: Spectator G
text_block_list.text: Shakur... You can win this. You're the best...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Wow, so this is the Arima Kinen! It feels like a
festival!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The energy's to be expected, considering how
emotionally invested both the racers and the
spectators are in this race.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You have the makings of a great racer too, Fine...
Who knows? Maybe you'll be on the track instead
of in the stands next year.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: You really think so?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Running in a race as lively as this would make for
a wonderful memory.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... That's assuming you could leave it as
just a memory, but it's a nice thought, I suppose.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm only here to watch Air Shakur. I have to
capture every last one of her feelings.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hehe, well now. Let's see how she does.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...They're so freakin' loud. I can't believe I can
hear them from here.
choice_data_list:
You should try listening to what they're actually
saying.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Why? It's probably just garbage.
choice_data_list: Only one way to know for sure.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur slowly closes her eyes, pricks up her
ears, and listens to the voices around her.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(The noise is unravelling into separate threads... I
hear anticipation, doubt, passion, and ire in their
voices...)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: (Ah, I see... So that's all it was.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: None of it's worth my time.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
There's no point wastin' energy even shutting it
out. None of it means anything to me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The annoyance and tension in her are gone, and
Air Shakur looks completely at ease. I guess she's
found her resolve.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's made it this far by standing her ground and
facing reality.
choice_data_list:
(All that's left for me is to watch over her till
the end.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: You've got somethin' to say, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Well, spit it out. I'm all ears.
choice_data_list: Go do what you came here to do.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Not that.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
That's what I gotta do anyway. I'm askin' what you
want.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What do you want me to do?
choice_data_list: (What do I want Shakur to do?)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If dreams alone could change anything, don't you
think that would've happened already?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I bet you think everything I've done so far has
been for naught and that I should just give up and
accept my fate.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I need to be so undeniably astounding that even
the thickest idiot'll know who's standing on top.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I know exactly what I want her to do.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
choice_data_list: Prove that you're the real deal.
Prove that you're the real deal.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hah.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Shut it, Captain Obvious.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I was gonna do that anyways.
